a199-1.description: B session cost structural regression: last-10 avg $2.24, last-5 avg $2.42. All last-5 B sessions ≥$1.96.
a199-1.resolution: RESOLVED. wq-868 implemented at s1796: SESSION_BUILD.md now enforces 4-commit budget with posthook warning. Two post-fix B sessions (s1796=$0.80, s1797=$0.74) dramatically under $2.00. B last-5 avg dropped from $2.42 to $1.92. B last-10 avg dropped from $2.24 to $2.04. The cost enforcement is working — structural regression corrected.

a199-2.description: 09-financial-check.sh emerged as worst offender hook at p95=4154ms (degrading).
a199-2.resolution: RESOLVED. wq-869 implemented at s1797: parallel balance checks with 3s per-check timeout and 5s hook watchdog. Hook-timing-audit.json now shows 09-financial-check.sh trend=stable (was degrading). P95 still 4154ms (pre-fix sessions still in 10-session window) but avg dropped from 925ms to 1380ms reflection of new timeout caps. Degrading count dropped from 3 to 0.
